entryType: direct entry into open living/dining area from bottom of plan
kitchenLocation: right side of unit, adjacent to dining area with pantry access
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with master bedroom on right side and two secondary bedrooms on left side
bathroomPlacement: ensuite bathroom for master bedroom, shared hall bathroom serving two secondary bedrooms
uniqueFeatures: dedicated laundry room rather than closet
each bedroom has generous walk-in closet
pantry separate from kitchen for additional storage
dining area centrally located for traffic flow
dimensionNotes: 40x25 foot rectangular footprint with bedrooms appearing similarly sized, open living/dining area takes up significant central space, efficient corridor minimizes wasted circulation area
